answer:
We have 4 Python-only developers and 6 who code in either Ruby on Rails or PHP (but not both). The total number of 3-member teams without restrictions is \(\binom{10}{3} = 120\). Teams with no Python developer are chosen only from the 6 non-Python developers, giving \(\binom{6}{3} = 20\), so teams with at least one Python developer are \(120 - 20 = 100\).

\boxed{A}
